description_long: This delicate flower features five translucent, pale pink petals arranged in a radial pattern around a small, dark central core. The petals have a slightly irregular, organic shape and appear to be made of a semi-transparent material, giving them a soft, ethereal quality. A slender, gently curving green stem supports the flower, with a single, elongated leaf attached partway up the stem. The leaf is light green with visible veins and a slightly wavy margin, adding to the naturalistic appearance. The overall structure is airy and lightweight, with the flower head positioned at the top of the stem. The design evokes the look of a stylized wildflower, suitable for decorative use in urban parks or landscaped areas.
description: A stylized flower with five translucent pink petals, a slender green stem, and a single veined leaf, evoking a delicate and airy appearance.
description_view_0: The flower is seen from the front, displaying all five petals radiating outward and the single leaf clearly visible on the left side of the stem.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thinness of the petals and stem, with the petals overlapping slightly and the leaf edge-on, making it less prominent.
description_view_2: The flower is shown from the back, with the five petals still visible but the central core and leaf now on the right side of the stem.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, again highlighting the slender profile of the petals and stem, with the leaf edge-on and less visible.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, evenly spaced around the central core, with slight overlapping at the base and clear radial symmetry.
